I trust that you remember that this program is not just about the content of influence, but also about the process of how to best use that content. Throughout this class, we'll be practicing the following process so that you'll acquire the habit of using influence more effectively long after this training is over. To help you be successful sleuths, my team and I created the influence process. By applying it, you will see that you will generate more effective and ethical outcomes in a much more efficient manner. The process contains four simple, but crucial steps. These steps are first, step back. Second, think. Third, solicit input and finally, create a plan. This process works best in groups of three to six people. In the upcoming videos, I'll explain each step more deeply.
